parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: The to be used to retrieve values. A row is created for each channel's value.

parameters.name: names
parameters.label: Include Names
parameters.description: When checked on, an extra column will be created in every row for the channel's name.

parameters.name: latestsample
parameters.label: Latest Sample when Time Slice
parameters.description: When on and the is time sliced, only the latest sample of the will be used to create the output. This prevents the table size from fluctuating as frames are dropped.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Create a row per channel or column per channel.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

examples.label: Configure Language and Include Names
examples.code:
n = op('chopto1')
n.par.language = 'text'
n.par.names = True
n.par.output = 'rowperchan'
examples.description: Common settings from 15 real Derivative examples
